terrain.prompt: Vast northern frontier terrain panorama, desolate snow plains and yellow sand dunes, distant fortress walls and beacon towers, sparse leafless trees, frozen river tributaries. Chinese ink wash painting style, panoramic landscape, muted winter tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 清凉山王府
scenes.description: 北凉王府主城，政治中枢。这里是北凉主城与主界面政治中枢，承接每日议事、人物互动、主线分派，提供招募、情报整理、主线分支选择。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of ancient Chinese warlord's grand fortress palace, imposing stone walls, watchtowers at corners, central grand hall with upturned eaves, inner courtyard with stone paths, northern frontier style architecture. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, atmospheric ink tones, no text, transparent background.

backdrop_variants.description: Wide panoramic landscape of the inner grounds of Qingliang Mountain Prince Manor, rendered in refined Chinese ink wash painting style, horizontal cinematic composition, 1536x1024. Foreground shows dark tiled corridors, carved wooden railings, stone steps, wind-worn bronze lantern stands, and a quiet courtyard with pine shadows spreading across wet flagstones. Midground reveals layered palace roofs, covered walkways, rock gardens, and still water reflecting ink-toned eaves. Background rises into mist-veiled Qingliang Mountain cliffs and ancient cypresses, with pale morning haze drifting between ridgelines. Rich depth, elegant austerity, solemn noble residence atmosphere, no people, no text, no UI.

Wide panoramic landscape of Qingliang Mountain Prince Manor in winter dusk, painted as a cinematic Chinese ink wash scene with horizontal composition and deep layered space. In the foreground, snow gathers along black roof tiles, courtyard edges, frozen pond stones, and silent vermilion gates muted into monochrome ink tones. Midground architecture stretches across the manor interior with grand halls, side pavilions, narrow alleys, and bare trees bending in cold wind. In the distance, mountain silhouettes dissolve into snowy fog and blue-gray twilight haze. The mood is restrained, majestic, desolate, and aristocratic, with drifting snow mist and strong atmospheric depth, no figures, no text.

Wide panoramic landscape of the interior precincts of Qingliang Mountain Prince Manor during a spring rain, executed in lush Chinese ink wash painting style for a cinematic game backdrop. Foreground features dripping eaves, mossy stone paths, rain-darkened courtyards, bamboo beside whitewashed walls, and shallow ripples spreading across a rectangular pond. Midground opens into layered halls, elegant pavilions, zigzag corridors, and garden rocks softened by rainfall. Background mountains emerge behind the manor through silver mist, with distant pines fading into clouded haze. The atmosphere is quiet, contemplative, and noble, with soft rain curtains creating rich depth and a serene Wuxia palace mood, no people, no text.

Wide panoramic landscape of Qingliang Mountain Prince Manor under autumn sunset, in expressive Chinese ink wash painting style, horizontal cinematic framing, richly layered depth. The foreground presents an open stone terrace, scattered fallen leaves, weathered bronze vessels, low balustrades, and a tranquil ornamental garden with twisted pines and scholar rocks. Midground shows the manor's grand interior compounds, sweeping tiled roofs, high walls, and connected halls glowing with warm reflected light in subdued ink colors. Far background reveals Qingliang Mountain ridges submerged in amber haze and drifting evening mist. The mood is stately, ancient, and slightly melancholic, with strong foreground detail and atmospheric distance, no humans, no text.

icon_variants.description: Top-down map icon of Qingliang Mountain Prince's Manor, a grand walled palace complex serving as the political heart of a northern frontier kingdom. Chinese ink wash painting style, centered composition, clear architectural silhouette, transparent background. Emphasize layered courtyards, a central audience hall with sweeping dark-tile roofs, gate towers, stone terraces climbing a mountain slope, and disciplined axial symmetry. Cool dawn mist drifts around pine-lined retaining walls, giving the landmark a solemn, strategic presence.

Top-down map icon of a majestic mountain-side royal manor in Chinese ink wash painting style, viewed from a slightly elevated bird's-eye angle. Center the palace fortress with bold silhouette and transparent background. Highlight thick outer walls, multiple ceremonial gates, interconnected halls, side courtyards, watchtowers, cliff-hugging foundations, and narrow paths winding among ancient pines and rock outcrops. Use crisp midday light and dry mountain air to reveal the orderly layout and austere authority of this northern political stronghold.

Top-down map icon of Qingliang Mountain Prince's Manor during a light snowfall, rendered as a Chinese ink wash architectural landmark illustration. Centered subject, transparent background, no figures. Focus on black-tiled roofs dusted with snow, high enclosing walls, the dominant main hall, rear residential courts, defensive corner towers, and mountain stone platforms descending in tiers. The bird's-eye composition should balance elegance and military restraint, with sparse winter trees and pale ink washes suggesting the cold northern capital atmosphere.

Top-down map icon of a royal manor atop Qingliang Mountain at dusk, in refined Chinese ink wash painting style. Centered architectural landmark, strong readable silhouette, transparent background. Feature an imposing central palace hall, flanking administrative buildings, inner courtyards, a formal front gate plaza, surrounding walls, and steep terrain supported by terraces and stairways. Add drifting rain and low clouds wrapping the mountain edges, using rich ink contrast to convey secret councils, power, and the weight of frontier governance.

scenes.name: 听潮亭
scenes.description: 秘档情报亭台，承载北凉旧史残卷和高手传闻。适合做文本探索与卡牌事件链，可掉落情报卡、标签卡，或解锁角色专属回忆。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of elegant pavilion on cliff overlooking northern plains, hexagonal roof with curved eaves, stone railing, surrounded by ancient pine trees, scrolls and lanterns visible within. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, serene ink tones, no text, transparent background.

icon_variants.description: Top-down map icon of Tingchao Pavilion, a three-story Chinese lakeside tower beside a broad tranquil lake, rendered in elegant Chinese ink wash painting style. Bird's-eye view architectural landmark illustration with the pavilion centered, dark tiled roofs stacked in ascending tiers, slender eaves, wooden corridors, and a curved shoreline wrapping one side. Early morning atmosphere with pale mist drifting over the water, soft gray ink gradients, crisp silhouette, minimal surrounding reeds and stones, transparent background, no people, no text.

Top-down map icon of Tingchao Pavilion in a dramatic overhead three-quarter bird's-eye view, showing a refined three-level lakeside pavilion extending toward a vast lake. Chinese ink wash painting style, centered subject, strong black brush outlines, layered roof geometry, balconies, and a small stone embankment defining the water's edge. Late afternoon light with warm muted sepia ink tones, calm rippling lake surface occupying one side, a few stylized willow shadows, clean isolated silhouette, transparent background, no figures, no labels.

Top-down map icon of Tingchao Pavilion during light rain, a three-story Jianghu-style lakeside loft standing beside an expansive lake. Rendered as a bird's-eye architectural landmark illustration in Chinese ink wash painting style, with the building centered and the lake sweeping around it in a crescent shape. Emphasize wet dark roof tiles, elegant upturned eaves, narrow walkways, mooring stones, and rain rings spreading across the water in diluted ink circles. Atmospheric gray-blue wash, clear silhouette, transparent background, no humans, no text.

Top-down map icon of Tingchao Pavilion at night under moonlight, depicted as a centered three-story waterside pavilion next to a large open lake. Chinese ink wash painting style with a refined bird's-eye view, highlighting the pavilion's stacked roofs, inner courtyard hints, and the lake's broad reflective surface bordering the structure. Use deep ink blacks, silver-gray washes, drifting lakeside fog, and sparse reeds to frame the landmark. Strong readable silhouette for game map use, transparent background, no people, no lettering.

backdrop_variants.description: Wide panoramic landscape, cinematic game scene background of Tingchao Pavilion in Chinese ink wash painting style. A refined four-story lakeside tower rises beside a broad still lake, viewed from a low shoreline angle with dark ink reeds, weathered stones, and sparse grasses in the foreground. The horizontal composition emphasizes layered depth: rippling water in the middle ground, the elegant pavilion reflected in misty shallows, and distant mountains dissolving into pale haze. Early morning atmosphere, soft silver light, drifting lake mist, subtle brush textures, quiet and contemplative mood, monochrome ink tones with restrained washes, no people, no text, no UI.

Wide panoramic landscape, cinematic backdrop of Tingchao Pavilion rendered as a Chinese ink wash painting. Seen from across the lake at sunset, the four-story pavilion stands near the water's edge, its tiered roofline silhouetted against a glowing sky of diluted cinnabar and gray ink washes. In the foreground, overhanging pine branches, broken rocks, and a narrow muddy bank frame the scene. The lake stretches wide with gentle wind-made ripples, while layered far hills and distant shore structures fade into atmospheric haze. Rich horizontal composition, poetic and melancholic mood, strong depth, elegant brushwork, no human figures, no text, no labels.

Wide panoramic landscape in Chinese ink wash painting style, designed as a cinematic game background of Tingchao Pavilion during rain. The four-story lakeside tower is viewed obliquely from a stone causeway, with slick foreground flagstones, rain-dark moss, scattered fallen leaves, and low shrubs leading the eye inward. Beside it lies a broad lake blurred by fine rainfall, circles spreading across the ink-toned water. Midground eaves and railings emerge through drifting moisture, while distant mountains and trees recede into dense gray mist. Somber late autumn atmosphere, layered depth, expressive wet-brush textures, horizontal composition, no people, no text, no UI elements.

Wide panoramic landscape, cinematic horizontal background of Tingchao Pavilion in winter, painted in Chinese ink wash style. From an elevated hillside viewpoint, the four-story pavilion sits beside a quiet lake partially edged with thin ice and snow-dusted reeds. Foreground twisted pines, jagged rocks, and patches of untouched snow create strong framing and depth. The middle ground opens to the pavilion and its cold reflection in dark water, while far banks, bare trees, and distant mountain ridges vanish into luminous white haze. Crisp, austere, tranquil mood, restrained monochrome palette with faint blue-gray wash, rich spatial layering, no characters, no text, no interface.

scenes.name: 陵州城市集
scenes.description: 开局最稳定的补给点，兵器、药材、马具、酒肆、说书摊等功能内容。承担基础商店、低风险事件和声望换资源。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of bustling northern frontier market town, rows of merchant stalls with awnings, stone paved streets, caravans and market crowds, timber-framed buildings with hanging lanterns. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, warm earthy tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 芦苇荡渡口
scenes.description: 通往江湖线的情绪场景，江湖邂逅之地。以角色检定和关系标签为主，成功后可获得高质量同伴、师承或债务型事件。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of misty river crossing among vast reed marshes, small wooden ferry dock, reed boats tied to posts, weeping willows, foggy water reflecting cattails. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view landscape icon, misty atmospheric tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 白马游弩校场
scenes.description: 北凉军阵与骑射训练的核心场景，突出北凉铁骑的独特气质。可做多角色战斗检定、编队试训、兵源强化。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of military training ground, archery targets and crossbow range, stone walls, cavalry practice track, weapon racks and armor stands, military banner poles. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, bold ink strokes, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 龙睛郡牧场
scenes.description: 马匹、军粮、牧民请求等边塞生计内容，能缓冲主线战争压力。可产出坐骑、补给、草料类资源。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of northern frontier horse ranch, wide grazing fields with wooden fences, stables with thatched roofs, water troughs, horses grazing, hay bales. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view landscape icon, open grassland tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 幽州马市
scenes.description: 边军、商旅、游侠和草原商人混杂之地，表现北地粗粝的交易氛围。高级装备购买、稀有坐骑交换、黑市竞价和情报倒卖。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of rough northern horse market, open square with trading stalls, tied horses and camels, merchant tents, fire pits, rough stone buildings with wooden signs. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, rough rugged ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 北凉暗驿
scenes.description: 偏功能型节点，荒野驿站与密信暗格。承担快速旅行、任务刷新、委托结算与跨地图情报传书。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of hidden frontier relay station, small isolated building among rocky terrain, secret passage entrance, message pigeonholes on wall, single road approaching through wilderness. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, dark secretive ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 流州边关
scenes.description: 从经营内政过渡到直面战争的关键节点。守城、粮草调度、武将轮驻、军心检定与敌情侦察，推向大战氛围。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of strategic frontier gate fortress, thick walls with battlements, watchtowers, gatehouse with iron portcullis, military supply storage, soldier barracks. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, imposing military ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 葫芦口前哨
scenes.description: 北凉地图末端的高压节点，代表真正的边境杀机与北莽威胁。限时突袭、精锐战、牺牲抉择和前线救援，解锁北莽地图。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of gourd-shaped mountain pass frontier outpost, narrow passage between cliffs, small defensive fortification, signal fire beacon tower, scattered sentry posts on rocky hills. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view landscape icon, tense dramatic ink tones, no text, transparent background.

terrain.prompt: Imperial capital terrain panorama, vast central plains with official roads stretching to horizon, red-walled palace compound visible in distance, willow-lined canal waterways, orderly agricultural fields. Chinese ink wash painting style, panoramic landscape, imperial warm tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 太安城朱雀门
scenes.description: 进入离阳核心权力场的第一重门面，名望不够进不去，关系不够站不稳。声望门槛节点，决定能否触发更高阶朝堂事件。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of magnificent imperial palace vermilion gate, massive red walls with golden roof tiles, imposing double-tower gatehouse, stone lion guardians flanking entrance, grand flagpole. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, imperial red and gold tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 尚书台
scenes.description: 派系投票、文书伪造、诬告与弹劾链条。强调社交、智慧、情报卡消耗，可换取政策支持、资金调拨和官员关系网。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of official government hall complex, symmetrical courtyard layout, memorial archways, document archives wing, officials' meeting chambers, imperial decree display stands. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, formal dignified ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 钦天监
scenes.description: 朝廷术士，星象与天命的政治利用空间。预言型事件、灾异牌、时运增益或伪造天象的高风险操作。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of imperial astronomical observatory, circular star-gazing platform on rooftop, bronze armillary sphere, gnomon shadow stone, mystical tower with observation deck, star charts on walls. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, mysterious celestial ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 皇城内库
scenes.description: 离阳地图的财富与证物中心，既是肥肉也是陷阱。合法调用、潜入盗取、贿赂挪用等方式获得大量金钱、珍宝或黑材料。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of imperial treasury vault, massive locked bronze doors, rows of storage chambers with seals, guard patrol routes visible, treasure crates stacked, hidden passage indicators. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, secretive guarded ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 天牢
scenes.description: 人物命运转折点，救人、灭口、递话、换供词类任务。结合潜行、关系、资源消耗，允许保人、弃子或反向设局。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of imperial dungeon prison, underground cell blocks arranged in grid, iron bar gates, guard post at entrance, narrow corridors, dim torch brackets on walls, stone interrogation chamber. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, dark oppressive ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 青鸟官驿
scenes.description: 跨地图任务投递、加急情报、时限任务刷新，是政治线的节奏器。让离阳地图具备明显的交通感与调度感。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of imperial courier relay station, horse stables attached, message tower with signal flags, official seal bureau, waiting room for couriers, well-maintained road junction. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, official clean ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 上阴学宫驿路
scenes.description: 书生、儒士、策论和名望任务，接触天下读书种子。偏智慧、魅力与口才判定，可招揽谋士、刷士林声望。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of scenic scholar's road through ancient trees, stone-paved path leading to academy gates, roadside teahouse for travelers, students with book satchels, calligraphy stones along path. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view landscape icon, elegant scholarly ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 上阴学宫
scenes.description: 谋士、先生和年轻才俊的重要来源，多轮拜访与名士事件。可解锁特殊顾问卡、策略增益卡和策论换资源的中后期玩法。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of grand Confucian academy campus, multiple lecture halls arranged around central courtyard, ancient cypress and pine trees, stone tablets with inscriptions, library tower, scholarly debate forum. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, serene academic ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 靖安别院
scenes.description: 笑里藏刀的宴席事件，宗室、藩王、旧党之间的私人较量。宴饮、送礼、诗会、暗杀等多种方式解决冲突，分支空间大。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of aristocratic garden villa with banquet pavilion, ornate rockery garden with winding paths, outdoor banquet terrace, private meeting chambers, scenic bridge over pond with lotus. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, luxurious refined ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 襄樊水驿
scenes.description: 离阳地图通往江南与西楚故地的外沿出口，军粮漕运、盐税运输重要枢纽。护送、劫漕、调兵和封锁商路。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of busy river canal relay station, multiple docked cargo barges, stone dock with unloading cranes, warehouse complex, military checkpoint, canal locks controlling water flow. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, busy commercial ink tones, no text, transparent background.

terrain.prompt: Southern water network terrain panorama, dense river tributaries and canals forming intricate web, willow-draped embankments, misty rainy atmosphere, ancient stone bridges, scattered fishing villages on waterways. Chinese ink wash painting style, panoramic landscape, misty rainy green-grey tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 广陵江渡口
scenes.description: 江南地图的入口，富庶但不太平的第一印象。船票、货运、护送、截杀和消息交换，也是跨图补给点。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of major river crossing hub, busy ferry docks with multiple boats, stone pier with cargo loading cranes, merchant warehouses, river customs checkpoint pavilion, banner poles. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, misty river atmosphere, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 盐帮黑埠
scenes.description: 利润与风险并存的节点，夜船、盐包、码头火把。高收益走私、稀有物资交易、黑市换牌，但会累积官府追查度。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of shadowy smuggling dock at night, stacked salt sacks by torchlight, secret underground storage, small hidden boats moored in reeds, secret guild meeting room, concealed entrance. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, dark moody ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 江南绣坊
scenes.description: 江南人情网络和礼物经济的起点。产出送礼卡、宴会服饰、名帖等社交资源，降低权谋地图和宗门地图中的交涉难度。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of elegant silk embroidery workshop, multiple looms visible through open windows, display room with silk tapestries, courtyard garden with flowering plum trees, merchant exchange counter at entrance. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, delicate refined ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 春神湖书肆
scenes.description: 文人清谈、密文递送、讽谏文章与秘史残卷。可解锁舆论牌、策士任务、古籍情报，触发诗文换声望的柔性成长。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of waterfront bookshop by misty lake, multi-story building with overhanging balcony over water, shelves of scrolls visible, scholar discussion pavilion attached, lotus flowers on spring lake. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, scholarly misty ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 亡国旧臣宅
scenes.description: 西楚遗臣、门客和死士暗流，江南地图最重要的政治爆点。招揽、策反、旧主遗命与复国筹划，人情与现实利益之间的选择。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of decaying former aristocrat's manor, overgrown garden with crumbling walls, hidden basement meeting room, concealed passage, faded glory architecture with broken tiles, secret document cache. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, melancholy faded ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 旧楚宫阙
scenes.description: 废宫强叙事场景，残破壁画、断檐和旧乐声烘托亡国不亡心。拾取遗物、触发旧楚人物记忆、解锁隐藏阵营标签或复国资源线。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of ruined ancient palace complex, collapsed walls with weeds growing through, broken pillars, overgrown courtyard, remnants of grand halls, faded mural fragments, crumbling watchtower. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, melancholy ruins ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 稻香水寨
scenes.description: 地盘争夺与船战味道。帮派围剿、运粮护航、招募水匪转私兵，形成与北凉军旅完全不同的战斗体验。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of fortified river water village stronghold, wooden palisade walls rising from water, boat docks with armed vessels, watchtowers, rope bridges connecting platforms, rice storage silos. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, defensive rustic ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 棠溪剑炉
scenes.description: 武器升级与名剑传闻节点，江南需要承接武器的地方。制作装备、修复名剑、触发剑客订单，通往武帝城线的前置节点。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of renowned swordsmith forge, glowing furnace at center, water wheel for bellows, sword display racks, quenching trough, finished blades hanging on walls, anvil and tools arranged neatly. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, forge fiery ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 西垒壁遗址
scenes.description: 江南地图的终局节点，残战场和执念感。大型连续事件、阵营抉择和强敌挑战，决定借西楚余绪造势，还是彻底压灭旧火。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of ancient battle ruins, crumbling siege walls with embedded arrows, abandoned siege equipment, scattered armor fragments, makeshift battlefield memorials, overgrown with wild grass. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view landscape icon, desolate tragic ink tones, no text, transparent background.

terrain.prompt: Mountain sect range terrain panorama, towering peaks shrouded in cloud and mist, ancient pine forests on steep cliffs, rope bridges spanning chasms, distant monastery rooftops peeking through fog, cascading waterfalls. Chinese ink wash painting style, panoramic shanshui landscape, misty cloud mountain tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 武当山门
scenes.description: 承接洪洗象、徐脂虎等情感与命数线索的地方。通过礼数、名望和人物关系进入更深层区域，不是谁都能见高人。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of Daoist mountain gate, grand ceremonial arch at mountain path entrance, stone steps leading upward, flanking pine trees, incense burner, inscription stone slab, mist-shrouded peak behind. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view architectural icon, serene daoist ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 小莲花峰
scenes.description: 带有宿命感的事件，氛围清冷却不空。天机、心境、角色宿缘牌，带来强增益但往往伴随延迟代价。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of lotus-shaped mountain peak meditation spot, lotus-petal rock formations around central platform, single hermit's stone hut, ancient pine clinging to cliff edge, misty clouds below peak. Chinese ink wash painting, bird's-eye view landscape icon, ethereal solitary ink tones, no text, transparent background.

scenes.name: 太虚宫
scenes.description: 武当内部的功能节点，道法、卜算、护身符与心法修习。提供一次性保护效果、气运修正与特殊法术型装备。
scenes.prompt: Top-down map icon of Daoist inner sanctum palace, symmetrical hall layout with yin-yang courtyard pattern, altar room, divination chamber, talisman burning furnace, star map ceiling visible through skylight. scenes.name: 龙虎山天师府
